title: Ad Astra Nether
description: The nether is now extremely hot and oxygen free!
body:
I made a mod where you need an Ad Astra Netherite suit to explore the Nether. Since it's not vanilla-friendly, I'd recommend a mod that adds an Overworld Netherite recipe or an Overworld Netherite ore.

the following mobs are safe in the nether

1.blaze

2.magma cube

3.zombified piglin

4.zoglin

5.enderman

6.ghast

7.piglin

8.piglin brute

9.skeleton

10.strider

11.wither skeleton

12.hoglin
